preferred_source.title: CalPERS Private Equity Program Update — Board Presentation (June 2025)
preferred_source.notes: CalPERS PE allocation increased to 17% target (range 12-22%). Total Portfolio Approach adopted effective July 2026. PE portfolio at 18.3% of fund as of Jan 2026. Direct insight into LP allocation behavior and GP selection criteria.

best_artifact.title: CalPERS Private Equity Program Update — Board Presentation (June 2025)
relevant_snippets: • EDCI launched with 7 GPs and 9 LPs/IMs representing about $4 trillion in assets under management (AUM) and
• Buyout at $63.3bn (68.7%), Growth at $21.9bn (23.7%), Opportunistic at $3.9bn (4.3%), Venture
• U.S. portfolio at $62.9bn (67.3%), Europe at $20.9bn (22.4%), Emerging Markets at $6.0bn
now has over 350 GPs and 150 LPs/IMs representing about $38 trillion of AUM
